content.full_text:
CITY HALL • 250 EAST L STREET • BENICIA, CA 94510 • (707) 746-4200

THE CITY OF
BENICIA
CALIFORNIA

August 7, 1990


Legal Division
California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Re: Pre-Adoption Review of Resolution Incorporating
2 CCR Section 18730

Dear Staff:

     Enclosed herewith is a proposed resolution incorporating by
reference Regulation 2 Cal. Code of Regs, Section 18730.  Also
enclosed is a list of current Benicia staff.

     Please review the proposed resolution.  I would appreciate any
suggested revisions before I submit the proposed regulation to the
City Council for adoption.

     Thank you for your assistance.


                                   Very truly yours,

                                   [signature]
                                   Richard G. Rypinski
                                   Asst. City Attorney


MARILYN CITRON O'ROURKE, Mayor                    MICHAEL WARREN, City Manager
Members of the City Council                        PHYLLIS GIBSON, City Treasurer
DIRK FULTON Mayor Pro Tem • JOHN F. SILVA • ERNEST R. CIARROCCHI • RICHARD W. SHAFER
                                                   FRANCES GRECO, City Clerk

                                   Recycled [symbol] Paper
